description: Reusable intake form schema for the rights/operator team to fill per content item before publish. Every value below is null or an explicit placeholder token -- this file is a form, not a filled record. Copy one 'intake_record' block per content_id and complete it with real, verified values before the corresponding blocker_code is considered resolved.

intake_record_schema.content_id: REQUIRED -- must match a real CONTENT_BACKLOG.json content_id

sources.source_type: PLACEHOLDER -- one of: document, merchant_input, manufacturer_source, marketplace_export, official_document, regulator_document, community_post
sources.source_locator: SOURCE_REQUIRED -- document title/location description, never a live URL fabricated by this template
sources.rights_or_permission: RIGHTS_REVIEW_REQUIRED -- one of: merchant_authorized, merchant_owned, owned, licensed, permitted, granted, permission_confirmed, or NOT_YET_CONFIRMED

images.capture_type: PLACEHOLDER -- one of: self_shot, cardnews_fallback_generated, licensed_stock
images.consent_or_license_proof: RIGHTS_REVIEW_REQUIRED -- description of the proof document, not the document itself
images.third_party_visible: PLACEHOLDER -- true/false; if true, consent_or_license_proof must cover third-party consent

operator_signoff.decision: PLACEHOLDER -- one of: approved_for_manual_upload, blocked, needs_more_evidence

hard_rule: No field in a completed intake_record may contain a fabricated URL, image file, price, performance figure, or rights approval. A field that cannot yet be verified stays as one of the allowed_placeholder_tokens or null -- it is never filled with a plausible-looking guess.
